violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of microwave has dried food inside of it.
Food service manager certification. — ---Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
